svg.title: Nested array as a grid with row and column indexes
svg.desc: A 3x3 nested array shown as a grid. Each cell shows how to access it using two indexes like array[row][column]

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I access grid[0][0] in a nested array?')
sendPrompt('How do I access grid[0][1] in a nested array?')
sendPrompt('How do I access the last item in a nested array row?')
sendPrompt('How do I access the middle element of a 3x3 nested array?')

svg.text: The Golden Rule: grid[ row ][ column ]
